steps.title: Use soil as the control
steps.content: The team concluded that nucleobases in the meteorite formed in space rather than coming from Earth contamination. The strongest supporting data would show nucleobases present in meteorite samples but absent from the nearby soil.

steps.title: Avoid contamination evidence
steps.content: Choices B and C include nucleobases detected in soil, which does not support a space-origin conclusion. Choice D only compares two meteorite samples and does not use the soil control. The remaining choice shows compounds in both meteorite samples but not in soil. The answer is A.
